commands.review_summary:
The PR changes CLI/TUI wording, adds timestamp prefixes to TUI rows, introduces a hands-free exec-policy preset, updates approvals docs, and adds TUI session activity/project-scoping behavior.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR blockers by source inspection: the PR head shows Markdown-mutating timestamping, rest-key-only session-event matching, default-session bypass, and pending-user timestamp loss. No runtime reproduction was attempted, and no real behavior proof was supplied.
